description: Approximately 10-12". Long neck. Brown bars on buff. Darker bars on wings and tail. Lower breast and belly largely unmarked. Yellow legs. Yellow bill, slight downward curve at tip. Reddish-brown crown. White eye ring, maybe just partial. Tail dark under tip.  (Yellow cast to feathers in photo is not accurate. The hazy sky was really bright behind this bird, and I was definitely not prepared with the proper equipment.)Behaviors: Sat on fence pipe for duration of observation. Turned head occasionally, ducked head once, but mainly ignored observer. Did not startle, fly or move along pipe. Did not call or sing.Call: Did not hear.Plumage: Summer, mature
